prompt: Can you draw a quick diagram of Salesforce + NetSuite + HubSpot data flow?
assertions: When format is unspecified, output defaults to Draw.io workflow.
Diagram includes Salesforce, NetSuite, and HubSpot.
Data-flow connections are represented between the systems.
Result is an integration-style diagram rather than an unrelated diagram type.
No Mermaid output is produced unless explicitly asked.
